subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Lord of all aims, Who at every day, nay, at every moment, increaseth the affection among His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصود را لایق و سزاست که هر یوم بل هر آن بر الفت اولیایش افزوده و
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
